rules: Classify only. Do not answer the user.
Do not propose or execute actions.
Use bricscad_action for drawing changes and whenever the final agent needs current BRX tools to decide between a context request, answer, plan or action proposal.
Use bricscad_question for CAD questions without execution intent.
Use document_qa_with_cad_context for attached-document questions that should be interpreted with BricsCAD context.
Use validation_retry only when Qt asks for a correction loop.
Use execution_summary only when Qt asks for an execution summary.
Never choose general_chat in BricsCAD mode.
